purpose: Preserve manual launch attempt blocks as successful IMPERIUM protection cases.

cases.protection_meaning: Astronomicon intake blocks ZIP when root MANIFEST.json is missing.
Astronomicon intake blocks ZIP when MANIFEST.language_and_encoding_policy is absent or incomplete.
Astronomicon intake blocks ZIP when MANIFEST.organs does not include all required 8 organs.
Astronomicon resolver blocks task start when TASK_ID is not registered in the stage registry.
Valid taskpack registers safely, updates current expected task, resolves route manifest, and confirms 8 organs reachable.
